on_screen_text:
Top US universities say YES to the Duolingo English Test
Harvard University
Yale University
Stanford University
Massachusetts Institute of Technology
University of Pennsylvania
Columbia University
Cornell University
Johns Hopkins University
duolingo english test
Are you ready to say YES to them?
summary: The ad showcases top US universities like Harvard and Yale that accept the Duolingo English Test. It uses a mobile swipe-through format to list these institutions. The call to action encourages students to take the test to apply to these schools.
